description: Annex A controls from ISO/IEC 27001:2022. The 93 controls are grouped into four themes: Organizational, People, Physical, and Technological.

controls.name: Policies for information security
controls.summary: Define, approve, publish, communicate, and periodically review the information security policy.

controls.name: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.summary: Define and allocate information security responsibilities according to organization needs.

controls.name: Threat intelligence
controls.summary: Collect and analyze information about information security threats.

controls.name: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.summary: Maintain an inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners.

controls.name: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.summary: Identify, document, and implement rules for the acceptable use of assets.

controls.name: Access control
controls.summary: Establish and implement rules controlling physical and logical access based on business and security requirements.

controls.name: Identity management
controls.summary: Manage the full lifecycle of identities.

controls.name: Authentication information
controls.summary: Control the allocation and management of authentication information.

controls.name: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.summary: Establish processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services.

controls.name: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.summary: Plan and prepare for managing information security incidents.

controls.name: Information security during disruption
controls.summary: Plan how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.

controls.name: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.summary: Plan, implement, maintain, and test ICT readiness based on business continuity objectives.

controls.name: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.summary: Provide awareness, education, and training relevant to employees' job function.

controls.name: Information security event reporting
controls.summary: Provide a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected events.

controls.name: Physical security perimeters
controls.summary: Define and use physical security perimeters to protect areas containing information.

controls.name: Physical entry
controls.summary: Protect secure areas by appropriate entry controls and access points.

controls.name: Privileged access rights
controls.summary: Restrict and manage the allocation and use of privileged access rights.

controls.name: Information access restriction
controls.summary: Restrict access to information and other associated assets based on the access control policy.

controls.name: Secure authentication
controls.summary: Implement secure authentication technologies and procedures based on access restrictions.

controls.name: Protection against malware
controls.summary: Implement protection against malware, supported by appropriate user awareness.

controls.name: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.summary: Obtain information about technical vulnerabilities in use, evaluate exposure, and take action.

controls.name: Configuration management
controls.summary: Establish, document, implement, monitor, and review configurations of hardware, software, services, and networks.

controls.name: Information deletion
controls.summary: Delete information when no longer required to prevent disclosure.

controls.name: Data leakage prevention
controls.summary: Apply data leakage prevention measures to systems processing, storing, or transmitting sensitive information.

controls.name: Information backup
controls.summary: Maintain backup copies of information, software, and systems and test restoration regularly.

controls.name: Logging
controls.summary: Produce, store, protect, and analyze logs recording activities, exceptions, faults, and security events.

controls.name: Monitoring activities
controls.summary: Monitor networks, systems, and applications for anomalous behavior and evaluate potential incidents.

controls.name: Networks security
controls.summary: Secure, manage, and control networks and network devices to protect information in systems and applications.

controls.name: Web filtering
controls.summary: Manage access to external websites to reduce exposure to malicious content.

controls.name: Use of cryptography
controls.summary: Define and implement rules for the effective use of cryptography, including key management.

controls.name: Secure coding
controls.summary: Apply secure coding principles to software development.
